十大棋牌网站排行榜【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238530233_60911010<br>vk.com/topic-238580520_61762617<br>vk.com/topic-238135070_61762650<br>vk.com/topic-238265037_62101475<br>vk.com/topic-238581371_62286042<br>vk.com/topic-238309426_61006910<br>vk.com/topic-238539764_60670030<br>vk.com/topic-238445856_61006918<br>vk.com/topic-238264836_61006928<br>vk.com/topic-238539930_61762685<br>vk.com/topic-238126735_60560599<br>vk.com/topic-238135101_62286057<br>vk.com/topic-238529743_60911104<br>vk.com/topic-238539362_61254396<br>vk.com/topic-238163236_61006956<br>vk.com/topic-238264951_62286082<br>vk.com/topic-238163198_61142215<br>vk.com/topic-238552414_60670063<br>vk.com/topic-238137582_61254430<br>vk.com/topic-238581373_60911143<br>vk.com/topic-238100039_61442384<br>vk.com/topic-238163206_61006980<br>vk.com/topic-237864373_60911124<br>vk.com/topic-238539186_61006984<br>vk.com/topic-238581399_61442402<br>vk.com/topic-238100043_60911162<br>vk.com/topic-238543369_61442418<br>vk.com/topic-238580093_60911166<br>vk.com/topic-238579994_60670100<br>vk.com/topic-238265094_60670108<br>vk.com/topic-238539367_62101587<br>vk.com/topic-238581212_61254482<br>vk.com/topic-238580055_60560673<br>vk.com/top
